Privacy PolicyYour privacy is very important to us. Accordingly, we have developed this Policy in order for you to understand how we collect, use, communicate and disclose and make use of personal information. The following outlines our privacy policy.

decoder_heading: Before or at the time of collecting personal information
ident_heading: Before or at the time of collecting personal information
heading_content_part: Before or at the time of collecting personal information, we will identify the purposes for which information is being collected.

decoder_heading: We will collect and use of personal information solely
ident_heading: We will collect and use of personal information solely
heading_content_part: We will collect and use of personal information solely with the objective of fulfilling those purposes specified by us and for other compatible purposes, unless we obtain the consent of the individual concerned or as required by law.

decoder_heading: We will only retain personal information
ident_heading: We will only retain personal information
heading_content_part: We will only retain personal information as long as necessary for the fulfillment of those purposes.

decoder_heading: We will collect personal information by lawful and fair means
ident_heading: We will collect personal information by lawful and fair means
heading_content_part: We will collect personal information by lawful and fair means and, where appropriate, with the knowledge or consent of the individual concerned.
Personal data should be relevant to the purposes for which it is to be used, and, to the extent necessary for those purposes, should be accurate, complete, and up-to-date.
We will protect personal information by reasonable security safeguards against loss or theft, as well as unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use or modification.

decoder_heading: We will make readily available to customers information about our policies
ident_heading: We will make readily available to customers information about our policies
heading_content_part: We will make readily available to customers information about our policies and practices relating to the management of personal information.

decoder_heading: We are committed to conducting our business
ident_heading: We are committed to conducting our business
